from pyspark.sql import SparkSession
from notebookutils import mssparkutils
import json
import re

spark: SparkSession = SparkSession.builder.getOrCreate()
storage_account: str = mssparkutils.notebook.run('/utils/py_utils_get_storage_account')
print(storage_account)
foldername="MiPINS/SAP_HR_Weekly"
config="config/"
source_path: str = f"abfss://odw-raw@{storage_account}{foldername}/"
config_file_path: str=f"abfss://odw-raw@{storage_account}{config}/"
print(source_path)
print(config)

# List all items in the directory
items = mssparkutils.fs.ls(source_path)

# Filter for directories and get their names and modification times
folders = [(item.name, item.modifyTime) for item in items if item.isDir]

# Sort folders by modification time in descending order
sorted_folders = sorted(folders, key=lambda x: x[1], reverse=True)

# Get the name of the latest modified folder
if sorted_folders:
    latest_folder = sorted_folders[0][0]
    print(f"Latest modified folder: {latest_folder}")
else:
    print("No folders found in the specified directory.")

# Initialize Spark Session
spark = SparkSession.builder \
    .appName("Excel to Synapse Table") \
    .config("spark.jars.packages", "com.crealytics:spark-excel_2.12:3.3.1") \
    .getOrCreate()

# Read configuration file
with open(config_file_path, 'r') as config_file:
    config = json.load(config_file)


# Construct the path to Excel files
excel_path = f"abfss://{config['container']}@{config['storage_account']}.dfs.core.windows.net/{latest_folder}/*.xlsx"

# Read Excel files
excel_df = spark.read.format("com.crealytics.spark.excel") \
    .option("header", "true") \
    .option("inferSchema", "true") \
    .load(excel_path)

# Add metadata columns
excel_df = excel_df.withColumn("source_file", lit(excel_path))
excel_df = excel_df.withColumn("load_date", lit(datetime.now().strftime("%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S")))

# Create Delta Table in Synapse
excel_df.write \
    .format("delta") \
    .mode("overwrite") \
    .saveAsTable("odw_standardised_db.SAP_HR_Weekly")

# Set Delta Table Properties
spark.sql(f"""
    ALTER TABLE odw_standardised_db.SAP_HR_Weekly 
    SET TBLPROPERTIES (
        'delta.columnMapping.mode' = 'name',
        'delta.minReaderVersion' = '2',
        'delta.minWriterVersion' = '5'
    )
""")

# Optional: Write to Synapse SQL Pool
excel_df.write \
    .format("com.microsoft.sqlserver.jdbc.spark") \
    .mode("overwrite") \
    .option("url", f"jdbc:sqlserver://{config['synapse_server']}.sql.azuresynapse.net:1433;database={config['target_database']}") \
    .option("dbtable", config['target_table']) \
    .option("user", config['username']) \
    .option("password", config['password']) \
    .option("driver", "com.microsoft.sqlserver.jdbc.SQLServerDriver") \
    .save()

print("Excel files successfully loaded to Synapse Delta Table and SQL Pool")

storage_acc = mssparkutils.notebook.run('/utils/py_utils_get_storage_account') # ends in / 
linked_service = "ls_storage"
db_name = "odw_standardised_db"

raw_container = "abfss://temp-sap-hr-data@" + storage_acc
raw_source_folder = ""
raw_name = "Addresses - 20221107_chris_changes.xlsx"

delta_lake_table_name = "addresses"
standardised_container = 'abfss://odw-standardised@' + storage_acc
standardised_source_folder = "HR/" + delta_lake_table_name + "/"
standardised_name = raw_name.split(".xlsx")[0] + '.snappy.parquet'


sheet_name = 0
header_row = 0

validate_parameters(storage_acc, raw_container, raw_source_folder, raw_name, standardised_container, standardised_source_folder, standardised_name, linked_service, sheet_name=0, header_row=0)
ingest_excel_to_parquet(storage_acc, raw_container, raw_source_folder, raw_name, standardised_container, standardised_source_folder, standardised_name, linked_service)
enable_delta_on_parquet(standardised_container, standardised_source_folder)
lakedb_table_sparksql(db_name,delta_lake_table_name,standardised_container, standardised_source_folder)
